A.text: The inner parts of the disk, close to the black hole

C.text: A thin band above and below the disk, but not near the center

parsed.answer_value: The inner parts of the disk, close to the black hole
parsed.rationale: In the middle stage, the inner parts of the disk, close to the black hole, are depicted with the brightest colors, indicating the highest energy density. The color gradient shows that the energy density decreases as you move outward from the center.
